name: us500_atr_pullback_ema_m5
hypothesis: On US500 M5 during US cash session (13:30-20:00 UTC), pullbacks to EMA(20) in an uptrend (EMA20>EMA50>EMA200, ADX>20) followed by an RSI(14) cross back above 50 yield a continuation move with PF>=2.0 across 200+ trades; mirror for shorts.

entry.long: ema(20)>ema(50)>ema(200) AND adx(14)>20 AND low of prior bar touched ema(20) within 0.25*ATR AND rsi(14) crosses above 50 AND close > ema(20)
entry.short: ema(20)<ema(50)<ema(200) AND adx(14)>20 AND high of prior bar touched ema(20) within 0.25*ATR AND rsi(14) crosses below 50 AND close < ema(20)
